reason: Irreconcilable conflict: 'behavior_in_task_description' requires instruction to specify literal strings checked by tests (e.g., 'field.getDeclaringClass().getName()', 'return writer.toString()', '%s vs %s'), but 'no_solution_leakage' forbids this as solution leakage. Step 3 of reconciliation instructions says to put literal test values in instruction, which directly contradicts the judge's no_solution_leakage rubric. This task cannot be fixed by rewriting instruction.md alone — the text-matching tests (solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text failures) need rewriting to be behavior-based, not pattern-based.
